mechanism_narrative: Sustained monthly payroll growth above 150,000 jobs signals robust labor demand and consumer income expansion, driving positive equity valuations through increased corporate earnings expectations over the next 20 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:September 2017 payroll level at 146,659k indicates near-full employment
regime_hint: late-cycle expansion with tight labor markets
failure_condition: Rank IC < 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or positive 20-day forward returns occur in fewer than 55% of months where PAYEMS growth exceeds 150k.

mechanism_narrative: Federal funds rate above 1.5% signals monetary tightening that increases discount rates on future corporate cash flows, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days as equity valuations compress.
evidence_refs: fact:September 2017 FEDFUNDS at 1.15% approaching tightening threshold
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 60-day returns in > 55% of instances when FEDFUNDS > 1.5%, or Rank IC reverses sign and remains negative for > 3 consecutive years.

mechanism_narrative: Real GDP growth acceleration combined with rising retail sales signals strengthening aggregate demand that lifts corporate profit margins and equity valuations. The joint expansion of both series over a 3-month window predicts positive 20-day forward returns.
candidate_trigger: GDPC1 quarterly growth > 2.5% AND RSAFS 3-month growth > 1.5%
evidence_refs: fact:Q2 2017 GDPC1 at 17031.1B, September 2017 RSAFS at 483,895M
regime_hint: synchronized demand expansion across consumption and production
failure_condition: Positive 20-day returns occur in fewer than 60% of triggered instances, or the interaction term (GDPC1 × RSAFS) produces Rank IC < 0.02 over any 3-year window.

mechanism_narrative: Industrial production index decline below 104.0 signals weakening manufacturing capacity utilization and supply-side constraints that compress profit margins, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days as growth expectations reset.
failure_condition: Negative 5-day returns occur in fewer than 52% of instances when INDPRO < 104.0, or Rank IC remains below 0.02 over any rolling 2-year window.

mechanism_narrative: Unemployment rate rise of more than 0.3 percentage points over 3 months signals deteriorating labor market conditions that reduce consumer confidence and discretionary spending, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:September 2017 UNRATE at 4.2%, historically low level
regime_hint: labor market deterioration or recession onset
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 60-day returns in > 58% of instances when UNRATE rises > 0.3pp, or Rank IC < 0.02 over any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: Housing starts decline below 1,100k units combined with retail sales weakness signals demand destruction in interest-rate-sensitive sectors. The joint deterioration predicts negative 20-day forward returns as forward earnings estimates decline.
evidence_refs: fact:August 2017 HOUST at 1,180k, September 2017 RSAFS at 483,895M
regime_hint: demand shock or rising rate environment
failure_condition: Positive 20-day returns occur in > 55% of triggered instances, or the interaction term produces Rank IC < 0.02 over any 3-year window.

mechanism_narrative: Inflation measured by CPI acceleration above 2.5% year-over-year combined with elevated federal funds rate signals monetary policy constraint that compresses real asset valuations. The joint tightening produces negative 60-day forward returns.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 60-day returns in > 55% of triggered instances, or the interaction term (CPIAUCSL × FEDFUNDS) produces Rank IC < 0.02 over any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: Industrial production growth above 105.0 combined with payroll expansion above 147,000 signals synchronized supply and labor expansion that supports margin expansion and positive equity valuations over the next 20 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:August 2017 INDPRO at 104.739, September 2017 PAYEMS at 146,659k
regime_hint: synchronized supply-side and labor expansion in late-cycle growth
failure_condition: Positive 20-day returns occur in fewer than 60% of triggered instances, or the interaction term produces Rank IC < 0.02 over any 3-year rolling window.
